Thanks for contributing to PixelSnitch! Please fill out this template so
reviewers can understand your change quickly.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, in one or two sentences? -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does this solve? Link to any related issue with "Closes #123". -->

## How I tested this

<!--
Manual test steps you ran. At minimum, please confirm the extension still
works on x.com. For UI or capture changes, describe what you captured
(text post, post with image, thread, etc.).
-->

- [ ] Loaded the unpacked extension in Chrome
- [ ] Captured a text-only post successfully
- [ ] Captured a post with media successfully
- [ ] No new errors in the DevTools console
- [ ] Verified the options page still works (if settings were touched)

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- If this is a visual change, before/after images are extremely helpful. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of the file(s) I edited
- [ ] I have not added new runtime dependencies (the project is vanilla JS by design)
- [ ] I have not introduced telemetry, tracking, or external network calls
- [ ] I updated documentation (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.) if the user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] My contribution is licensed under the [MIT License](../LICENSE)
